creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
Just for completeness: a demo exploit for the buffer overflow in 4.0.2091 
ia available here:

http://downloads.securityfocus.com/vulnerabilities/exploits/google-earth-v4.0.20
91beta-bufferoverflow.c

(Had to append a backslash '\' to lines 8 and 9 to compile.) While this 
would crash 4.0.2091, the current version 4.0.2414 displays a warning 
about invalid data and remains stable. Thus it appears that they indeed 
have fixed this issue.
